name: 2.0B - Oom Sakkie Backend Read-Only Relay
description: Callable, inactive relay contract for the existing GateKeeper to call the Flask-owned read-only Oom Sakkie Telegram gateway. No Telegram trigger or send node.

parameters.jsCode:
const response = $json || {};
const message = response.message && typeof response.message === "object" ? response.message : {};
const reply = response.reply && typeof response.reply === "object" ? response.reply : {};

const forbiddenAuthority = [
  response.sends_telegram === true,
  response.direct_bot_cutover_enabled === true,
  response.can_trigger_outbound_llm === true,
  response.writes === true,
  response.dispatch_enabled === true,
  response.changes_runtime_now === true,
  response.changes_prompt_now === true,
  response.physical_controls_enabled === true,
  response.customer_public_output_enabled === true,
];

const safe = response.success === true
  && response.status === "answered"
  && response.reply_transport === "caller_handles_telegram_send"
  && forbiddenAuthority.every((flag) => flag === false)
  && String(reply.chat_id || "").trim() !== ""
  && String(reply.text || response.answer || "").trim() !== "";

if (!safe) {
  return [{
    json: {
      success: false,
      send_allowed: false,
      status: response.status || "backend_gateway_rejected",
      backend_status: response.status || "",
      backend_success: response.success === true,
      sends_telegram: response.sends_telegram === true,
      direct_bot_cutover_enabled: response.direct_bot_cutover_enabled === true,
      can_trigger_outbound_llm: response.can_trigger_outbound_llm === true,
      writes: response.writes === true,
      records_audit_trace: response.records_audit_trace === true,
      dispatch_enabled: response.dispatch_enabled === true,
      changes_runtime_now: response.changes_runtime_now === true,
      changes_prompt_now: response.changes_prompt_now === true,
      physical_controls_enabled: response.physical_controls_enabled === true,
      customer_public_output_enabled: response.customer_public_output_enabled === true,
      backend_response: response,
    },
  }];
}

return [{
  json: {
    success: true,
    send_allowed: true,
    status: "relay_reply_ready",
    backend_status: response.status,
    chat_id: String(reply.chat_id).trim(),
    telegram_text: String(reply.text || response.answer).trim().slice(0, 4000),
    reply_transport: response.reply_transport,
    sends_telegram: false,
    direct_bot_cutover_enabled: false,
    can_trigger_outbound_llm: false,
    writes: false,
    records_audit_trace: response.records_audit_trace === true,
    dispatch_enabled: false,
    changes_runtime_now: false,
    changes_prompt_now: false,
    physical_controls_enabled: false,
    customer_public_output_enabled: false,
    backend_message_mode: message.mode || "",
    backend_response: response,
  },
}];

parameters.content: Phase 10.9DJ read-only backend relay contract. Callable only from GateKeeper. No Telegram Trigger and no Telegram send node. Backend owns answer and safety flags; this workflow returns a guarded caller-send payload only and refuses remote plain HTTP before using the token.
